testcase.name: test_create_teacher_assignment

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 422 assert 422 in [200, 201, 400, 409] + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_81.py:241: in test_create_teacher_assignment assert response.status_code in [200, 201, 400, 409], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 422 E assert 422 in [200, 201, 400, 409] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_official_curriculum_stats

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have stages_count assert 'stages_count' in {'grade_subject_mappings': 394, 'grades': 29, 'is_locked': True, 'is_official': True, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_81.py:339: in test_get_official_curriculum_stats assert "stages_count" in stats, "Should have stages_count" E AssertionError: Should have stages_count E assert 'stages_count' in {'grade_subject_mappings': 394, 'grades': 29, 'is_locked': True, 'is_official': True, ...}
